items.title: Risk of Myasthenia Gravis Exacerbation During Pregnancy and Postpartum: A Nationwide Cohort Study.
items.abstract: The impact of pregnancy on the clinical course of myasthenia gravis (MG) remains uncertain, with existing evidence mainly derived from small case series. Using nationwide longitudinal register data, we aimed to assess the risk of MG exacerbation during pregnancy and up to 1 year postpartum. In this population-based cohort study, we included women with MG recorded in the Swedish National MG Register who had singleton pregnancies documented in the Medical Birth Register after MG diagnosis (1987-2019). The exposure was pregnancy, and the outcome was MG exacerbation. The primary outcome measure was hospital admissions with MG during pregnancy and the postpartum year, compared with the year preceding pregnancy. Cox proportional hazards models estimated hazard ratios (HRs), adjusting for disease duration and prior thymectomy. The secondary outcome measure was changes in immunosuppressive MG medications during pregnancy and postpartum. We identified 112 women with MG (median age 30 years) with 176 singleton pregnancies. During pregnancy, women were not more likely to be hospitalized for MG than in the prepregnancy year (HR 0.74, 95% CI 0.39-1.41), and there was no increased risk of longer hospital admissions (HR 0.83, 95% CI 0.36-1.88). The postpartum period was associated with an increased risk of prolonged MG admissions during the first 3 months (HR 5.02, 95% CI 1.66-15.24), with a similar risk observed throughout the first 12 months postpartum (HR 4.52, 95% CI 1.26-16.14). During pregnancy, immunosuppressive MG medications were reduced or discontinued in 13 pregnancies and increased in 6. Postpartum, medications were initiated or escalated in 10 pregnancies and reduced in none. The risk of prolonged MG admissions was higher in periods outside of pregnancy compared with the prepregnancy year (HR 2.95, 95% CI 0.84-10.43), suggesting that women conceive during periods of relative disease stability. Pregnancy was not associated with an increased risk of MG exacerbation. The postpartum period was linked to more severe or prolonged exacerbations in a minority of women, highlighting the importance of close monitoring after delivery. Milder exacerbations not requiring hospitalization or clear medication escalation may have been underestimated, underscoring the need for larger prospective international studies that include detailed clinical data.
items.summary_ja:
背景：重症筋無力症（MG）における妊娠の影響は不明瞭で、これまでの知見は小規模症例報告に限られていた。  
方法：スウェーデンの全国MG登録と出生登録を用い、1987～2019年にMG診断後に単胎妊娠を経験した112人の女性（176妊娠）を対象に、妊娠中および産後1年間のMG悪化リスクを、妊娠前1年と比較して検討した。主な評価はMGによる入院の有無と期間、二次評価は免疫抑制薬の使用変化である。  
結果：妊娠中のMG入院リスクは妊娠前と変わらず（HR 0.74）、長期入院リスクも増加しなかった。一方、産後3か月間は長期入院リスクが有意に増加（HR 5.02）し、産後12か月間も高リスクが続いた。妊娠中は免疫抑制薬が減量・中止されることが多く、産後は増量または開始される傾向があった。  
結論：妊娠自体はMG悪化リスクを高めないが、産後は一部の女性で重度または長期の悪化がみられ、慎重な経過観察が必要である。軽度の悪化は過小評価されている可能性があり、詳細な臨床データを含む大規模国際前向き研究が求められる。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、スウェーデンの全国登録データを用いて、重症筋無力症（MG）患者の妊娠中および産後1年までの病状悪化リスクを評価した。妊娠中のMG悪化による入院リスクは増加せず、むしろ安定期に妊娠している可能性が示唆された。一方、産後3か月以内に長期入院を伴う悪化リスクが有意に上昇し、産後の綿密な管理の重要性が示された。軽度悪化の把握にはさらなる大規模研究が必要である。

items.title: Clinical Reasoning: A 55-Year-Old Man With Rapidly Progressive Weakness and Numbness.
items.abstract: A 55-year-old man with uncontrolled diabetes presented with progressive length-dependent weakness, numbness, and paresthesia, leading to profound upper extremity weakness and lower extremity paraplegia in 4 months. A review of systems additionally revealed leg edema, chest wall erythema, and weight loss. Nerve conduction study/electromyography (NCS/EMG) showed axonal length-dependent sensorimotor polyneuropathy. Additional testing revealed a rare etiology. Treatment was started, and the patient's symptoms stabilized. This report discusses the diagnostic approach to rapidly progressive polyneuropathies, emphasizing careful systemic examination, laboratory studies, imaging, and electrophysiologic testing. It also highlights the importance of looking beyond neurologic signs to identify systemic evidence of disease involvement.
items.summary_ja: 背景：55歳の糖尿病患者が、4か月間で急速に進行する四肢の筋力低下と感覚障害を呈し、上肢の著しい筋力低下と下肢の対麻痺に至った。方法：症状の詳細な聴取と身体診察に加え、神経伝導検査・筋電図（NCS/EMG）を実施し、軸索性の長さ依存性感覚運動多発ニューロパチーと診断。さらに全身症状（下肢浮腫、胸壁紅斑、体重減少）を踏まえ、追加検査を行い稀な原因を同定した。結果：適切な治療開始により症状の進行は安定化した。結論：急速進行性多発ニューロパチーの診断には、神経学的所見に加え全身症状の評価が重要であり、系統的な身体検査、検査、画像診断、電気生理学的検査を組み合わせることで、基礎疾患の早期発見と治療開始が可能となる。
items.summary_short_ja: 55歳の糖尿病患者が、4か月で急速に進行する四肢の筋力低下と感覚障害を呈した。神経伝導検査で軸索性の長さ依存性感覚運動性多発ニューロパチーと診断され、追加検査により稀な原因が判明した。全身症状の評価と多角的検査を通じて診断を確定し、治療開始後に症状の安定化を得た。本報告は、急速進行性多発ニューロパチーの診断における全身評価の重要性を示している。

items.title: Postapproval Study for Brain-Responsive Neurostimulation for Drug-Resistant Focal Epilepsy: Three-Year Efficacy and Interim Safety Results.
items.abstract: Neuromodulation therapies are approved for the treatment of focal epilepsy based on data from randomized controlled trials (RCTs). After approval of a responsive direct brain stimulation device (The RNS System for focal epilepsy), the Food and Drug Administration required a prospective study to evaluate whether real-world safety and effectiveness differed from outcomes in the RCT. This open-labeled study enrolled adult participants who met the RNS System-approved indication for use. The primary effectiveness end point was median percent change in seizure frequency at 3 years of treatment. Interim safety is presented; the primary safety endpoint analysis will be conducted at 5 years. Across 32 US epilepsy centers, 324 patients (mean age 37.1, 59.6% female individuals) were implanted and 271 completed 3 years of follow-up. The median percent reduction in seizure frequency at 6 months was 62% and 82% at 3 years ( This prospective real-world study contributes to the body of evidence that adjunctive direct brain-responsive neurostimulation provides significant and sustained reductions in the frequency of focal seizures. Seizure reductions were greater and were achieved faster than in the RCT and long-term treatment trials but were similar to a more recent retrospective multicenter real-world study. As in the preapproval studies, treatment was well-tolerated and safe, and the SUDEP rate was low. The RNS System showed similar safety and improved seizure outcomes in real-world use compared with the RCT. Improvements in efficacy may reflect changes in programming practices. Future research efforts will focus on using the brain data obtained by the device to optimize detection and stimulation paradigms for each patient. ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT02403843, submitted March 26, 2015. This study provides Class IV evidence that in adults with refractory focal-onset seizures, direct brain-responsive neurostimulation reduces seizure frequency without serious adverse events up to 3 years.
items.summary_ja:
背景：薬物抵抗性局所てんかんに対する神経調節療法として、脳反応型直接刺激装置（RNSシステム）が承認されたが、実臨床での安全性・有効性の検証が求められた。  
方法：米国32施設でRNSシステム適応の成人324名を対象に前向きオープンラベル研究を実施し、3年間の発作頻度の中央値変化を主要効果指標とした。安全性の中間解析も報告。  
結果：271名が3年追跡を完了し、発作頻度は6か月で中央値62％減、3年で82％減少した。発作抑制効果はランダム化比較試験（RCT）よりも早期かつ大きく、長期治療試験や他の実臨床研究と同等であった。治療は良好に忍容され、重篤な有害事象やSUDEP（突然死）は低率であった。  
結論：RNSシステムは実臨床においてRCTと同等以上の安全性と優れた発作抑制効果を示し、プログラミングの進歩が効果向上に寄与している可能性がある。今後は装置から得られる脳データを活用した個別最適化が期待される。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、薬物抵抗性局所てんかん患者に対する脳応答型神経刺激装置（RNSシステム）の3年間の実臨床効果と中間安全性を検証した。324名が参加し、3年後の発作頻度は中央値で82％減少。安全性も良好で、RCTよりも効果が早期かつ大きく現れた。実世界での使用においても高い有効性と安全性が示され、今後は個別最適化に向けた脳データ活用が期待される。

items.title: Association of MRI-Visible Perivascular Spaces With Longitudinal Cognitive Decline Over a Decade.
items.abstract: Cerebral small vessel disease (SVD) is the most common vascular contributor to dementia. SVD markers often coexist, contributing to difficulty assessing their independent contributions to cognitive domains. MRI-visible perivascular spaces (PVSs) are an emerging SVD marker visualized by MRI. We previously showed that basal ganglia PVSs cross-sectionally contribute to worse cognition, independent of other SVD markers. To further characterize the clinical relevance of PVS, we studied its role as a unique SVD marker of longitudinal cognitive decline. Participants without stroke or dementia were included in the Vanderbilt Memory and Aging Project, a longitudinal observational cohort study based in Nashville, TN. Participants completed 3T MRI at study entry to measure SVD burden (PVS volume fraction, white matter hyperintensities volume, lacune counts, and cerebral microbleeds counts). PVS volumes were segmented using a deep learning algorithm. Participants underwent comprehensive serial neuropsychological testing over an 11-year follow-up period (mean follow-up = 4.9 ± 3.1 years). Each SVD marker was related to longitudinal neuropsychological performances using a linear mixed-effects model adjusting for age, sex, race/ethnicity, education, baseline cognitive status, apolipoprotein E-ε4 presence, Framingham Stroke Risk Profile, and intracranial volume. Head-to-head comparisons simultaneously tested multiple statistically significant SVD markers. Among participants (n = 750, age 68 ± 9 years, 52% female), higher basal ganglia PVS burden at baseline was associated with worse longitudinal performances in Boston Naming Test (β = -29.63; 95% CI -56.66 to -2.60), Animal Naming (β = -33.09; 95% CI -65.66 to -0.51), Wechsler Adult Intelligence Scale IV Coding (β = -86.36; 95% CI -150.9 to -21.82), executive function composite (β = -9.51; 95% CI -14.33 to -4.68), Hooper Visual Organization Test (β = -26.06; 95% CI -50.53 to -1.59), and episodic memory composite (β = -7.05; 95% CI -11.9 to -2.21). In head-to-head comparisons, basal ganglia PVS remained independent associations with executive function composite (β = -7.47; 95% CI -12.84 to -2.10) and Hooper Visual Organization Test (β = -22.11; 95% CI -42.38 to -1.85). Basal ganglia PVS burden independently contributes to worse longitudinal executive function and visuospatial skills independent of other SVD markers, highlighting PVS as an emerging marker of domain-specific cognitive decline in aging. Although causation cannot be established, findings further support PVS as a vascular contributor to deep brain structure damage underlying cognitive decline over time.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳の小血管病（SVD）は認知症の主要な血管性要因であり、複数のSVDマーカーが共存するため、それぞれの認知機能への独立した影響評価が困難である。MRIで可視化される周血管腔（PVS）は新たなSVDマーカーとして注目されている。  
方法：脳卒中や認知症のない750名（平均年齢68歳）を対象に、ベースラインで3T MRIを用いてPVS容積、白質病変、ラクーン、微小出血を測定。PVSは深層学習でセグメンテーションし、11年間にわたる神経心理学的検査の経時的変化を線形混合モデルで解析。年齢や性別、遺伝子型などを調整した。  
結果：基底核のPVS負荷が高いほど、言語、実行機能、視空間認知、エピソード記憶の経時的低下と有意に関連。特に実行機能と視空間認知においては、他のSVDマーカーの影響を除いても独立した悪影響が認められた。  
結論：基底核PVSは他のSVDマーカーとは独立して、加齢に伴う特定認知領域の長期的低下に寄与する新たな血管性認知機能低下の指標であり、深部脳構造の血管障害を反映している可能性が示唆された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、MRIで可視化される脳基底核の周血管腔（PVS）が、他の脳小血管病（SVD）マーカーとは独立して、10年以上にわたる認知機能低下、特に実行機能や視空間認知の悪化と関連することを示した。750名の高齢者を対象に深層学習でPVSを定量化し、長期の神経心理検査結果と比較。PVSは加齢に伴う特定認知領域の低下を示す新たな血管性マーカーとして注目される。

items.title: Heterogeneity in the Analysis of the ALSFRS-R in ALS Clinical Trials and its Effect on the Validity and Precision of Trial Conclusions.
items.abstract: Disability rating scales play a pivotal role in clinical trials, but there is a notable lack of guidance on how to analyze these scales. Using amyotrophic lateral sclerosis as a case study, our aim was to explore how disability rating scales have been analyzed in completed clinical trials and to assess how these different approaches influence both the risk of false-positive findings and the statistical power to detect true treatment effects. We searched PubMed and Embase to systematically identify randomized, placebo-controlled clinical trials using the revised ALS functional rating scale (ALSFRS-R) as primary end point, with ≥20 randomly assigned patients and ≥12-weeks of follow-up. Data were extracted on the statistical analysis approaches and strategies for handling missing data. Variability in statistical methods was mapped to the various research questions that the trials aimed to address. A simulation study assessed how each statistical method influenced validity (false-positive rate) and precision (statistical power), using the Ceftriaxone trial data set to model a realistic trial scenario. Our analysis included 45 randomized clinical trials, comprising a total sample size of 7,338 patients, and identified 39 distinct statistical methods using a mixture of longitudinal and cross-sectional techniques. Most trials (55.6%) did not use all available (longitudinal) ALSFRS-R measurements, resulting in suboptimal utilization of patient data and reduced statistical precision. Applying the different statistical methods to the same trial data set resulted in large differences in the estimated treatment effect size, ranging from a negative 1.33 to a positive 2.33 SD difference. Among the methods used, 38.9% (95% CI 24.8%-55.1%) were at risk of increasing false-positive rates, potentially contributing to the erroneous advancement of ineffective treatments. Statistical power of valid strategies varied widely, ranging from 17.9% to 78.2%. Our results demonstrate considerable variability in statistical methods, with the choice of method able to influence the estimated treatment effects, potentially resulting in misleading conclusions and uncertainty about treatment effects. This limits the interpretability and comparability of clinical trials and influences clinical decision-making and drug development. Establishing statistical consensus recommendations could improve the utility of disability scales in clinical trials and accelerate progress toward effective therapies for neurodegenerative diseases.
items.summary_ja:
背景：ALS（筋萎縮性側索硬化症）の臨床試験で用いられる障害評価尺度ALSFRS-Rの解析方法には統一的な指針がなく、解析手法の違いが試験結果の妥当性や精度に影響を与える可能性がある。  
方法：PubMedおよびEmbaseで、ALSFRS-Rを主要評価項目とした無作為化プラセボ対照試験を検索し、45試験（計7,338例）を対象に統計解析手法と欠測データ処理法を抽出・分類。さらに、シミュレーション解析で各手法の偽陽性率や検出力を評価した。  
結果：39種類の解析手法が確認され、55.6%の試験は全ての縦断的データを活用しておらず、統計的精度が低下していた。同一データに異なる手法を適用すると治療効果推定値は-1.33から+2.33標準偏差の幅で大きく変動。38.9%の手法は偽陽性率を高めるリスクがあり、検出力も17.9%～78.2%と大きくばらついた。  
結論：ALSFRS-R解析には大きな手法のばらつきがあり、解析方法の選択が治療効果の推定や試験結果の解釈に影響を及ぼす。統計解析の標準化が臨床試験の信頼性向上と神経変性疾患治療の開発促進に重要である。
items.summary_short_ja: ALS臨床試験におけるALSFRS-Rの解析方法は多様であり、45試験で39種類の統計手法が確認された。多くは縦断データを十分活用せず、統計的精度が低下している。解析手法により治療効果の推定値や偽陽性率が大きく異なり、誤った結論や治療効果の不確実性を招く可能性がある。統計解析の標準化が臨床試験の解釈性向上と治療開発促進に重要である。

items.title: Differences in Survival Associated With the First Antiseizure Medication in People With Dementia and Epilepsy.
items.abstract: Epilepsy is an increasingly recognized comorbidity in neurocognitive disorders. Although experts recommend newer antiseizure medications (ASMs), whether there are real-world benefits of selecting particular ASMs for epilepsy in dementia remains unknown. Our objective was to examine whether different ASMs are associated with differences in survival in persons with epilepsy and dementia. A cohort study was conducted using Swedish national registers. We included individuals with dementia who received ASM treatment after a diagnosis of epilepsy after January 1, 2006. Data were analyzed until December 2023. Dispensed ASMs (Anatomical Therapeutic Code N03) were used to identify treatment; patients were categorized as starting one of the 4 most common ASMs (carbamazepine, levetiracetam, lamotrigine, valproate) or other ASMs. Recurrent prescriptions were used to determine treatment duration. Associations between all-cause death and ASMs were assessed by Cox proportional hazards regression. We also assessed causes of death and the risk of cardiovascular death. In Sweden, between 2006 and 2023, we included 5,764 individuals (2,811 men [48.8%] and 2,953 women [51.2%]) using their first ASM after a diagnosis of epilepsy and dementia. Carbamazepine (n = 1,578) was the most common ASM before 2015 and levetiracetam (n = 2098) most common thereafter. In Kaplan-Meier analyses and Cox regression models adjusting for age, sex, year of ASM start, and comorbidities, valproate (n = 746) was associated with increased adjusted hazard ratio (aHR) of death (1.34, 95% CI 1.20-1.48), in contrast to lamotrigine (n = 922, aHR: 0.84, 95% CI 0.75-0.93) and levetiracetam (n = 2098, aHR: 0.93, 95% CI 0.85-1.03). The risks were similar in analyses using restricted mean survival time, propensity score-matched sets of participants, balancing weights in regression models, and cases with epilepsy onset in existing dementia. Cardiovascular causes of death were more common among users of valproate or carbamazepine than among users of lamotrigine and levetiracetam. Compared with carbamazepine, valproate was associated with increased risk of cardiovascular death (aHR: 1.30; 95% CI 1.11-1.52) while lamotrigine (aHR 0.79; 95% CI 0.66-0.94) was associated with a reduced risk. In this population-wide cohort study, use of valproate was associated with the highest risk of death in persons with epilepsy and dementia. Lamotrigine and, in some models, levetiracetam were associated with better survival than both valproate and carbamazepine. This provides real-world support for existing expert guidelines.
items.summary_ja:
背景：認知症患者におけるてんかんは重要な併存症であり、新しい抗てんかん薬（ASM）が推奨されているが、実際の生存率への影響は不明であった。  
方法：スウェーデンの全国登録データを用い、2006年以降に認知症とてんかんと診断されASM治療を開始した5,764人を対象に、カルバマゼピン、レベチラセタム、ラモトリギン、バルプロ酸の4種とその他のASMの生存率を比較。Cox比例ハザードモデルで全死因死亡および心血管死リスクを解析した。  
結果：バルプロ酸使用者は調整後ハザード比（aHR）1.34（95%CI 1.20-1.48）で死亡リスクが最も高く、ラモトリギン（aHR 0.84）およびレベチラセタム（aHR 0.93）は死亡リスクが低かった。心血管死はバルプロ酸およびカルバマゼピン使用者で多く、ラモトリギン使用者は心血管死リスクが低かった。  
結論：認知症とてんかん患者において、バルプロ酸の使用は死亡リスクを高める一方、ラモトリギンおよびレベチラセタムは生存率改善に寄与する。これらの結果は専門家のガイドラインを支持する実世界データを提供する。
items.summary_short_ja: 認知症とてんかんを併発する患者5,764名を対象に、最初に使用された抗てんかん薬（ASM）と生存率の関連を調査した。結果、バルプロ酸は死亡リスクを有意に増加させ（aHR 1.34）、心血管死のリスクも高かった。一方、ラモトリギンは死亡リスクを低減し（aHR 0.84）、カルバマゼピンやレベチラセタムよりも生存率が良好であった。これらの結果は専門家の推奨を支持する実証的証拠となる。

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Thrombectomy With or Without Alteplase in Large Vessel Occlusion Stroke: A Meta-Analysis Considering Time-to-Treatment.
items.abstract: In stroke patients directly admitted to thrombectomy-capable centers, the value of intravenous thrombolysis (IVT) with alteplase before thrombectomy is time dependent. While early IVT may improve outcomes, delayed IVT administration lowers the likelihood of benefit. To date, no previous cost-effectiveness study has considered onset-to-treatment time. This study evaluated the cost-effectiveness of intravenous (IV) alteplase plus thrombectomy vs thrombectomy alone in patients admitted directly to thrombectomy-capable centers across 16 countries, stratified by onset-to-IVT time. A decision tree integrated with a Markov model estimated costs, quality-adjusted life years (QALYs), and incremental net monetary benefit (INMB) over 15 years. A willingness-to-pay threshold of one gross domestic product per capita was applied for each country. Effectiveness data were derived from individual patient data from 6 trials including patients with anterior circulation large-vessel occlusion eligible for both IVT and thrombectomy who presented directly to thrombectomy-capable centers. Costs were obtained from a literature review. Onset-to-IVT time was categorized as <140, 140-169, 170-199, and ≥200 minutes. One-way sensitivity and probabilistic sensitivity analyses were performed to check robustness of results. Ninety-day functional outcome distributions from 2,268 patients (median age 71 years; 44% female) were used to model cost-effectiveness in a hypothetical cohort of 10,000 patients. Without accounting for onset-to-IVT time, IV alteplase plus thrombectomy seemed cost-effective in 13 countries (INMB: $85-$3,618; 50-65% probability of cost-effectiveness) and not cost-effective in the United States, China, and Vietnam, with modest health gains (0.06-0.08 QALYs per patient). Time-stratified analyses revealed that IVT plus thrombectomy was cost-effective in 16 countries when onset-to-IVT time was <140 minutes (INMB: $615-$30,645; 82%-98% probability) and at 140-169 minutes (INMB: $86-$16,918; 51%-77% probability). However, IV alteplase plus thrombectomy was no longer cost-effective in 8 countries at 170-199 minutes. Universally, the INMB was negative for onset-to-IVT times exceeding 200 minutes. Cost-effectiveness of IV alteplase plus thrombectomy varies per country and onset-to-IVT time. IV alteplase plus thrombectomy is cost-effective when IVT can be administered within 170 minutes from symptom onset. Cost-effectiveness of IV alteplase plus thrombectomy diminishes progressively with longer onset-to-IVT times and becomes detrimental after 200 minutes.
items.summary_ja:
背景：大血管閉塞脳卒中患者において、血栓除去術（thrombectomy）前のアルテプラーゼによる静脈内血栓溶解療法（IVT）の効果は治療開始までの時間に依存するが、これまで発症から治療開始までの時間を考慮した費用対効果分析はなかった。  
方法：16か国の血栓除去可能施設に直接搬送された患者を対象に、IVアルテプラーゼ＋血栓除去術と血栓除去術単独の費用対効果を、発症からIVT開始までの時間別（<140分、140-169分、170-199分、≥200分）にメタ解析とマルコフモデルで評価。費用は文献より取得し、効果は6試験の個別患者データ（2,268例）から算出。15年間のQALYsと純経済利益（INMB）を比較。  
結果：時間を考慮しない場合、13か国でIVT併用が費用対効果的であったが、米国・中国・ベトナムではそうでなかった。発症からIVT開始が170分以内では16か国すべてで費用対効果が高く、特に140分未満で顕著であった。一方、170分以降では8か国で費用対効果が低下し、200分以上では全ての国で逆効果となった。  
結論：IVアルテプラーゼ併用血栓除去術の費用対効果は発症から治療開始までの時間に強く依存し、170分以内の早期治療が推奨される。時間経過とともに効果は減少し、200分を超えると経済的にも不利益となる。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、大血管閉塞脳卒中患者における血栓回収療法（thrombectomy）前のアルテプラーゼ静注療法（IVT）の費用対効果を、発症から治療開始までの時間別に16か国で評価した。発症からIVT開始まで170分以内であれば、IVT併用は多くの国で費用対効果が高いが、時間が延びると効果が減少し、200分を超えると逆に費用対効果が悪化することが示された。迅速なIVT開始の重要性を示す結果である。

items.title: Characterizing Individuals Fulfilling Clinical Criteria for Limbic-Predominant Age-Related TDP-43 Encephalopathy in a Tertiary Memory Clinic.
items.abstract: Limbic-predominant age-related TDP-43 encephalopathy (LATE) is characterized by an amnestic- and limbic-predominant phenotype, which can mimic Alzheimer disease (AD). In a memory clinic cohort, we tested whether clinical criteria for LATE can detect a clinical profile of LATE that is distinct from AD. In this retrospective examination of a longitudinal memory clinic cohort from the Alzheimer Center Amsterdam, we included individuals with mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and dementia (aged >50 years). We classified individuals based on baseline data on cognition, atrophy, amyloid-status, and tau-status into Probable- and Possible-LATE, co-occurring LATE and AD (LATE-AD), and AD (without LATE). Next, we compared these groups on demographics, clinical features, cognition, and atrophy. Of 3,606 individuals (mean age at baseline 66 [SD 6], 49.2% female) available for classification, we classified 56 (1.6%) as Probable-LATE, 115 (3.2%) as Possible-LATE, 127 (3.5%) as LATE-AD, and 1,675 (46.5%) as AD. Individuals with Probable-LATE progressed slower than AD on mini-mental state examination (MMSE) (sβ [SE] = 0.12 [0.05],  Using an operationalization of clinical criteria for LATE, 8.2% of participants with MCI or dementia from our tertiary memory clinic were classified as Possible-LATE, Probable-LATE, or LATE-AD. Probable-LATE was characterized by a milder disease course than AD, whereas LATE-AD was characterized by a more aggressive disease course. This underscores the value of the proposed clinical criteria in identifying individuals with suspected LATE, who have distinct clinical trajectories from AD. Our findings, therefore, support the use of these criteria to improve diagnostic and prognostic accuracy in the memory clinic.
items.summary_ja:
背景：Limbic-predominant age-related TDP-43 encephalopathy（LATE）は、記憶障害や辺縁系優位の症状を示し、アルツハイマー病（AD）と類似することがある。  
方法：アムステルダムのアルツハイマーセンターの記憶クリニックに通う50歳以上の軽度認知障害（MCI）および認知症患者3,606名を対象に、認知機能、萎縮、アミロイドおよびタウの状態から臨床基準に基づきProbable-LATE、Possible-LATE、LATE-AD（LATEとADの併存）、AD（LATEなし）に分類し、各群の臨床特徴や認知機能、進行速度を比較した。  
結果：対象者の8.2%がPossible-LATE、Probable-LATE、またはLATE-ADに分類された。Probable-LATE群はAD群よりも認知機能低下の進行が緩やかであった一方、LATE-AD群はより進行が速かった。  
結論：LATEの臨床基準はADと異なる臨床経過を示す患者を特定でき、診断および予後予測の精度向上に有用であることが示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、三次記憶クリニックの認知障害患者を対象に、LATE（辺縁系優位加齢関連TDP-43脳症）の臨床基準を用いてAD（アルツハイマー病）と異なる臨床像を検証した。3,606例中8.2%がLATE関連群に分類され、Probable-LATEはADより進行が緩徐で、LATE-ADはより進行が速いことが示された。これにより、LATEの臨床基準は診断・予後の精度向上に有用であることが示唆された。

items.title: Cognitive Fluctuations, Neuropsychiatric Burden, and Quality of Life in Moderate-Advanced Dementia With Lewy Bodies: The Role of Dysautonomia.
items.abstract: Cognitive fluctuations are reported in 90% of individuals with dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB) and along with dysautonomia, are a key source of disability. Through this effort, we sought to investigate the relationship between autonomic burden and cognitive fluctuations, neuropsychiatric burden and quality of life in moderate-advanced DLB. This multicenter, prospective, observational, longitudinal cohort study, Predicting ACcurately End-of-Life in Dementia With Lewy Bodies and Promoting Quality End-of-Life Experiences (PACE-DLB), was conducted in the United States to study individuals with moderate-advanced DLB. The primary exposure for the current analysis was time-varying total autonomic burden, as measured by the autonomic symptom checklist (ASC) at baseline and follow-up visits. The primary outcomes were cognitive fluctuations measured by Clinician Assessment of Fluctuations (CAF) scores and neuropsychiatric burden as measured by Neuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire (NPI-Q) scores. Secondary outcomes included quality of life (QoL) captured through the Quality of Life-Alzheimer's Disease scale. Mixed-effects regression analyses were conducted to assess the effect of autonomic burden on each primary outcome, with age, sex, education, Charlson Comorbidity Index, anticholinergic burden, levodopa equivalent daily dosage, and EPWORTH sleepiness scale scores adjusted as potential confounders. We additionally conducted modified graphical network model analyses. A total of 189 patients with 745 longitudinal observations were included in the analysis. Mean age of the cohort was 74.92 years (SD 7.77 years) with 22% female participants. At baseline, ASC was directly associated with CAF (RC = 0.16; 95% CI 0.01-0.31;  Autonomic burden correlates with severity of cognitive fluctuations and neuropsychiatric burden in moderate-advanced DLB. It also correlates with the QoL of the caregiver over time. These results encourage investigation into novel potential therapeutic avenues in moderate-advanced DLB.
items.summary_ja:
背景：レビー小体型認知症（DLB）では認知の変動が90％にみられ、自律神経障害（ディスオートノミア）とともに障害の主要因とされる。本研究は、中等度から進行期のDLB患者における自律神経負荷と認知変動、神経精神症状負荷、生活の質（QoL）との関連を検討した。  
方法：米国の多施設共同前向き観察コホート研究PACE-DLBにて、189名の中等度～進行期DLB患者を対象に、自律神経症状チェックリスト（ASC）による自律神経負荷を基準および追跡時に測定。認知変動はClinician Assessment of Fluctuations（CAF）、神経精神症状負荷はNeuropsychiatric Inventory Questionnaire（NPI-Q）、QoLはQuality of Life-Alzheimer's Disease尺度で評価。混合効果回帰分析により年齢・性別などを調整し関連を解析。  
結果：745件の縦断的観察で、自律神経負荷は認知変動（CAFスコア）および神経精神症状負荷（NPI-Qスコア）と有意に正の相関を示した。また、介護者のQoLにも影響を及ぼすことが示された。  
結論：中等度から進行期DLBにおいて、自律神経負荷は認知変動や神経精神症状の重症度と関連し、介護者のQoLにも影響を与える。これらの知見は新たな治療法開発の可能性を示唆する。
items.summary_short_ja: レビー小体型認知症（DLB）の中等度から進行期患者189名を対象に、自律神経障害の負担が認知の変動や神経精神症状、生活の質（QoL）に与える影響を縦断的に調査した。自律神経負担は認知変動や神経精神症状の重症度と有意に関連し、介護者のQoLにも影響を及ぼすことが示された。これらの知見は、DLBの新たな治療法開発の可能性を示唆している。

items.title: Acute Environmental Triggers and Intermediate-Term Modulators of Emergency Migraine-Related Health Care Encounters.
items.abstract: Migraine activity is shaped not only by the biological vulnerability but also by environmental factors that may influence susceptibility and contribute to fluctuations in migraine occurrence, although the evidence remains inconsistent. We aimed to evaluate the intermediate-term and short-term effects of environmental exposures on migraine activity and to examine a conceptual layered model comprising biological vulnerability, intermediate-term environmental modulators, and acute triggers. We conducted a population-based case-crossover study among patients with migraine identified from the Negev Migraine Cohort (2000-2023), using electronic medical records from Clalit Health Services and Soroka University Medical Center. Eligible participants were adult patients (≥18 years) residing in Be'er Sheva, Israel, with migraine diagnoses or triptan prescriptions. Daily exposure to air pollutants and meteorologic conditions were obtained from fixed monitoring stations. Outcomes were emergency migraine-related encounters as a marker of triggered events and quarterly triptan use as a marker for disease activity. Intermediate-term modulators were defined as weekly climatic conditions hypothesized to modify the short-term effects of daily exposures. Associations were evaluated using conditional logistic and Poisson regression. The analysis included 7,032 adult patients with migraine residing in Be'er Sheva. Short-term exposure to nitrogen dioxide (NO Short-term and cumulative exposure to ambient air pollution and climatic factors were associated with increased migraine activity. Although these findings support a layered model of environmental modulation of migraine activity, their generalizability is limited by the use of emergency health care encounters as a proxy outcome, underscoring the need for further research using complementary measures.
items.summary_ja:
背景：片頭痛の発症は生物学的脆弱性だけでなく、環境要因も影響し、発症頻度の変動に寄与すると考えられるが、証拠は一貫していない。  
方法：イスラエルのベールシェバ在住の成人片頭痛患者7,032名を対象に、2000～2023年の電子医療記録を用いた症例交差研究を実施。大気汚染物質（特に二酸化窒素）や気象条件の短期・中期曝露と、救急受診やトリプタン使用頻度との関連を条件付きロジスティック回帰およびポアソン回帰で解析した。中期調整因子は週単位の気候条件と定義。  
結果：短期および累積的な大気汚染曝露と気象要因は、救急受診による片頭痛発作の増加およびトリプタン使用頻度の上昇と有意に関連した。  
結論：片頭痛活動は生物学的脆弱性に加え、中期的環境調整因子と急性トリガーの多層モデルで説明可能であるが、救急受診を指標としたため一般化には限界があり、補完的評価を用いたさらなる研究が必要である。
items.summary_short_ja: 本研究は、イスラエル・ベールシェバ在住の7,032人の片頭痛患者を対象に、大気汚染や気象条件が片頭痛発作に与える短期および中期の影響を調査した。特に二酸化窒素などの大気汚染物質への曝露が、緊急医療受診やトリプタン使用の増加と関連し、環境要因が生物学的脆弱性に加え片頭痛活動を層状に調節するモデルを支持した。ただし、緊急受診を指標としたため一般化には限界があり、さらなる検証が必要である。
